title: HMW DNA Extraction Protocol for Ferns
author: Geferson Fernando Metz

steps.title: Recover and store the spores together with sporangia in 1
steps.instruction: Recover and store the spores together with sporangia in 1.5 mL microtubes until one-third of the tube was filled and then stored at -20 °C until disinfection.

steps.title: Figure 2
steps.instruction: Figure 2. Step by step extraction of high-molecular-weight DNA illustrated protocol. Illustration by Crix D'Oliveira.

steps.title: Homogenize by inversion 10 times and...
steps.instruction: Homogenize by inversion 10 times and incubate at 60 °C for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Add 1 mL 70% Ethanol Contributed...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL 70% Ethanol Contributed by users , homogenize by inversion for 00:00:20 and briefly centrifuge them.

steps.title: Discard the supernatant and wash by...
steps.instruction: Discard the supernatant and wash by inversion with 1 mL of autoclaved purified water, briefly centrifuge and discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Add 1 mL of an Sodium...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of an Sodium Hypochlorite Solution Contributed by users (active chlorine ~2%) at 10 % (v/v) , homogenize by inversion for 00:20:00 , centrifuge at 5.000 rpm, °C, 00:03:00 .

steps.title: Discard the supernatant and wash by...
steps.instruction: Discard the supernatant and wash by inversion with 1 mL of autoclaved purified water, centrifuge at 5 5.000 rpm, °C, 00:03:00 . Repeat this step 4 times.

steps.title: Add 1 mL autoclaved purified water,...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL autoclaved purified water, homogenize and pipete into a Petri Dish with BCD medium (MgS04.7H2O - 0.1 mM, KH2PO4 - 1.84 mM, KNO3 - 1M, FeSO4.7H2O - 4.5mM).

steps.title: Weigh between 50 mg and 100 mg of leaf tissue
steps.instruction: Weigh between 50 mg and 100 mg of leaf tissue. Grind must be done with a crucible and pestle (previously exposed to Liquid nitrogen Contributed by users ) until a very fine powder is obtained.

steps.title: Pre-heat the Lysis Buffer and aliquot...
steps.instruction: Pre-heat the Lysis Buffer and aliquot 600 µL for each sample individually in 1.5 mL microtube. With the aid of a spoon or spatula, transfer the macerate to the microtube.

steps.title: Add 4 µL of RNase A...
steps.instruction: Add 4 µL of RNase A (100 mg/mL); add 4 µL of proteinase K (> 40 U/mg);

steps.title: Homogenize by inversion 10 times and...
steps.instruction: Homogenize by inversion 10 times and incubate at 60 °C for 00:20:00 gently homogenizing by inversion every 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Add 600 µL of Chloroform
steps.instruction: Add 600 µL of Chloroform: Isoamyl Alcohol (24:1) Contributed by users and homogenize by inversion for at least 00:03:00 until an off-white emulsion forms.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 14
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 14.000 rpm, , for 00:05:00 at room temperature.

steps.title: Carefully aspirate the upper phase of...
steps.instruction: Carefully aspirate the upper phase of the tube and transfer to a new 1.5 mL microtube.

steps.title: Add 400 µL of Isopropanol Contributed...
steps.instruction: Add 400 µL of Isopropanol Contributed by users -20 °C and incubate it for at least 01:00:00 at -20 °C . (Can be stored overnight)

steps.title: Centrifuge at 14
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 14.000 rpm, , for 00:05:00 at room temperature and discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Add 50 µL of TE Buffer Contributed by users
steps.instruction: Add 50 µL of TE Buffer Contributed by users . Add 5 µL of 3M sodium acetate Contributed by users .

steps.title: Add 120 µL of iced Ethanol...
steps.instruction: Add 120 µL of iced Ethanol 100% Contributed by users ( -20 °C ) and mix well by flicking the tube.

steps.title: Store tubes at -20 °C for at least 00:20:00
steps.instruction: Store tubes at -20 °C for at least 00:20:00 .

steps.title: Centrifuge at 14
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 14.000 rpm, , for 00:15:00 at room temperature and carefully discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Add 1 mL of freshly prepared...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of freshly prepared 70% Ethanol Contributed by users , mix gently by inversion, centrifuge briefly and carefully discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Dry the pellet for approximately 00:10:00...
steps.instruction: Dry the pellet for approximately 00:10:00 at Room Temperature on the bench with the tube upside down.

steps.title: Elute in 50 µL volume in...
steps.instruction: Elute in 50 µL volume in nuclease free water Contributed by users . (Elution volume can be adjusted for your needs)

steps.title: Quantify the DNA on a Qubit®...
steps.instruction: Quantify the DNA on a Qubit® fluorometer (dsDNA high sensitivity assay). DNA yield can be 500 - 1500 ng.

steps.title: Check DNA integrity though electrophoresis in a 1'% Agarose Gel
steps.instruction: Check DNA integrity though electrophoresis in a 1'% Agarose Gel.

steps.title: Remove short DNA fragments with Circulomics® Short-Read Eliminator Kit
steps.instruction: Remove short DNA fragments with Circulomics® Short-Read Eliminator Kit.

steps.title: Figure 1
steps.instruction: Figure 1. Step by step plant spore and sporangia sterilization. Illustration by Crix D'Oliveira.

steps.title: Sample and store the leaf tissue...
steps.instruction: Sample and store the leaf tissue (fronds) in paper envelopes for three days to induce dehiscence.
